Site: MBBS Admissions in Abroad
Owner: New-Lyf Overseas
Primary URL: https://www.mbbsadmissionsinabroad.com/

Summary:
MBBS Admissions in Abroad helps students and families compare MBBS abroad, medical PG abroad, nursing job pathways, German language preparation, and Ausbildung options.

Important pages:
- Homepage: https://www.mbbsadmissionsinabroad.com/
- Contact: https://www.mbbsadmissionsinabroad.com/contact
- Blog: https://www.mbbsadmissionsinabroad.com/blog
- Gallery: https://www.mbbsadmissionsinabroad.com/gallery
- Nursing Jobs Abroad: https://www.mbbsadmissionsinabroad.com/nursing-jobs-in-abroad
- PG Abroad: https://www.mbbsadmissionsinabroad.com/pg-in-abroad
- Medical PG in Germany: https://www.mbbsadmissionsinabroad.com/medical-pg-in-germany
- Ausbildung: https://www.mbbsadmissionsinabroad.com/ausbildung
- Sitemap: https://www.mbbsadmissionsinabroad.com/sitemap.xml
- Privacy Policy: https://www.mbbsadmissionsinabroad.com/privacy-policy
- Terms and Conditions: https://www.mbbsadmissionsinabroad.com/terms-and-conditions

Guidance:
- Use the country and pathway pages to compare recognition, fees, living costs, and next-step planning.
- Use the contact page for counselling and eligibility help.
- Use the sitemap for crawl discovery.
